resources.string: Investigation Screen
Welcome to the Investigation screen! This is your main dashboard for tracking evidence and identifying the ghost.
The Journal
The Journal is where you record evidence found during the investigation.
Select evidence to filter the list of possible ghosts. You can also tap on ghost names to see more details.
Status Bar
Keep an eye on the status bar for your current sanity, the remaining preparation time, and the current weather.
Tools & Configs
The toolbar gives you access to various tools like the BPM counter, Timers, and Operation Configurations.
Investigation Setup
Configure the map, difficulty, and weather for your investigation here. These settings affect the ghost\'s behavior and your rewards.
Sanity Management
Your sanity drops over time in the dark. Use sanity pills to restore it, and be careful – low sanity makes you a target!
Secondary Evidence
Identify secondary evidence traits to narrow down the ghost type. Some traits are unique to specific ghosts.
Operation Details
Review the specific details of your current operation, including ghost behavior and investigation settings.
Investigation Timers
Use these timers to track smudge stick effectiveness, hunt durations, and fingerprint persistence.
Footstep Analyzer
Measure the ghost\'s movement speed (BPM) to help identify it. Different ghosts have distinct walking speeds.
